description_long: This object is a modern grave monument set on a rectangular stone base. The headstone features a striking design with two upright slabs: one is black with a rounded top, and the other is gray with a straight edge, both made of polished stone. The grave cover is a matching gray stone slab that sits atop a slightly raised platform, bordered by a darker stone trim. The base is a lighter gray, likely concrete or granite, providing a stable foundation. The monument has clean, geometric lines and a contemporary aesthetic, with no visible inscriptions or decorative motifs. The materials and construction suggest durability and permanence, typical of urban cemetery monuments.
description: A modern grave monument with dual-tone upright headstones and a gray stone slab cover on a rectangular base. The design is geometric and contemporary, with contrasting black and gray polished stone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-tone upright headstones—one black and rounded, one gray and straight—set on a rectangular stone base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstones and the layered stone platform beneath the grave cover.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headstones and the full length of the gray stone slab cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstones and the raised platform structure.
